session.user:
Run the following test commands in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all results. Do NOT fix anything.
1. `uv run pytest tests/commands/objective/ -x -v` (objective command tests) 2. `uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/ -x -v` (unit tests for objective commands)
Report all output including pass/fail counts and any error details.
session.assistant: I'll run both test commands and report all results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run unit tests for objective commands

click.ClickException: If objective cannot be resolved or has no pending unblocked nodes raise click.ClickException("Not in a git repository") raise click.ClickException("Not on a branch") raise click.ClickException( raise click.ClickException("Repository has no GitHub remote configured") if isinstance(result, ObjectiveValidationError): raise click.ClickException(result.error) > raise click.ClickException(f"Objective #{issue_number} has no roadmap phases") E click.exceptions.ClickException: Objective #42 has no roadmap phases src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py:241: ClickException FAILED tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_plan_cmd.py::TestResolveAllUnblocked::test_returns_pending_unblocked_nodes - click.exceptions.ClickException: Objective #42 has no roadmap phases !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! stopping after 1 failures !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! ========================= 1 failed, 43 passed in 1.02s =========================
session.assistant:
## Test Results Summary
### Test 1: `tests/commands/objective/` - FAILED
**Status**: 18 passed, 1 failed
**Failure Details:** - **Test**: `test_plan_next_with_issue_ref` - **File**: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/objective/test_plan.py:339` - **Error**: `assert 1 == 0` - Command exited with code 1 instead of 0 - **Root cause**: Unknown - the test assertion doesn't show the detailed error output from the CLI invocation
---
### Test 2: `tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/` - FAILED
**Status**: 43 passed, 1 failed
**Failure Details:** - **Test**: `TestResolveAllUnblocked::test_returns_pending_unblocked_nodes` - **File**: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_plan_cmd.py:189` - **Error**: `click.exceptions.ClickException: Objective #42 has no roadmap phases` - **Location**: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/objective/plan_cmd.py:241` - **Root cause**: The `_resolve_all_unblocked` function is raising an exception because the objective issue doesn't have roadmap phases in its validation result. The test fixture `_FAN_OUT_BODY` may not be generating proper graph nodes.
---
**Summary**: Both test suites have single test failures related to objective/plan functionality. The second failure shows more detail - it appears to be a fixture/setup issue where the objective body doesn't parse into a valid roadmap with phases.
